name: Cheung Woh Technologies Ltd
summary: Cheung Woh Technologies Ltd manufactures and supplies precision hard disk drive components. It operates through Hard Disk Drive Components and Precision Metal Stamping Components segments. The Hard Disk Drive Components segment offers voice coil motor plates, air combs, and baseplates. The Precision Metal Stamping Components segment provides sheet metal machined parts and computer numerical controlled machined parts. It serves the hard disk drive, communications, electrical and electronics, semiconductor, and automotive industries in Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, the United States, the Philippines, Europe, the People's Republic of China, the Middle East, and internationally. The company was incorporated in 1972 and is based in Singapore.
